data.name: A Dream That Changes Everything
data.detailed_description:
GO ALONG FOR THE RIDE.

Indulge yourself in waves of desire and electrifying ecstasy.



You play as an 18-year-old girl who grew up in a quiet town, living a simple life alongside your childhood best friend, Michelle. But after your father’s passing and your mother’s growing struggles, you’re forced to consider a new path.

One day, Michelle reaches out from the big city of Alivara with a promising offer: a place to stay and a job opportunity at her studio. With nothing holding you back, you take the chance—ready to embrace the unknown.

What awaits in Alivara is far more intense and seductive than you imagined. From casual flirtation to increasingly wild encounters, your new life quickly spirals into one of temptation, corruption, and uninhibited pleasure.

Will you survive the city... or surrender to its pleasures?





  • A kinetic visual novel with erotic and emotional storytelling
  • Collect 20 high-quality CGs of key erotic encounters
  • Female protagonist with a corruption-driven progression arc
  • Explicit scenes including oral sex, vaginal sex, lesbian encounters, group sex, and more
  • Interracial scenes, creampie, and dominant/submissive dynamics
  • Workplace-themed roleplay and adult situations

Note: This game contains mature content and is intended for adults (18+) only. Themes of manipulation, coercion, and sexual domination are present.

data.short_description: A naive village girl follows her childhood friend to the big city—only to be lured into a life of seduction, secrets, and wild pleasures. Explore, unlock scenes, and experience her erotic transformation in this adult visual novel.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 Pro 64bit (10.0, Build 18363)
  • 處理器: Intel(R) Celeron(R) CPU N2840 @ 2.16GHz (2CPUs), ~2.2GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel® HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 64-bit processor and operating system.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
